studies.title: Randomized controlled clinical trial of the efficacy of the digital self-help program edupression.com® in mild-to-moderate unipolar depressive patients
studies.brief_summary:
The purpose of this clinical study is to investigate the effectiveness of the self-help program edupression.com® in the treatment of a mild to moderately severe depressive episode. In addition, it will be investigated which factors influence the usage behavior of depressive patients. edupression.com® is an intelligent self-help program for depressive patients. 
edupression.com® consists of two digital medical devices that are CE certified in the EU and will be provided to patients free of charge in a single intelligent self-help program as part of this study. Participants eligible for the study will be randomly assigned to one of two study groups: a control group and an intervention group. The intervention group will receive full access to edupression.com® for 12 weeks. This intervention includes all medical products of edupression.com®: psychoeducation with elements of cognitive behavioral psychotherapy (learning content and exercises) and a mood chart (monitoring of depression sympt
